title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: The video argues that bots now dominate web traffic, AI systems like Google AI Overviews answer user queries before click-through, and AI agents are starting to browse and transact online. It frames this as a fundamental shift from human-centric to machine-centric internet use.
writeup: The video makes the case that the internet is shifting from human-centric to machine-centric use. It points to three trends: bots now account for the majority of web traffic, AI systems such as Google AI Overviews answer queries directly so users click through less, and AI agents are beginning to browse and transact online. The framing matters because it reframes the web as infrastructure increasingly used by machines rather than people, touching on web scraping and AI-generated content.
